description:
Mesh Korea is providing smart logistic service called ‘Vroong’. They built the service using various AWS services, such as Amazon ECS, Amazon Elasticache, and Amazon Elasticsearch as well as open source solutions. Learn how Mesh Korea built their A/B test data platform in micro-service architecture by 3 people within 3 weeks and how the platform is helping Mesh Korea run various experiments for all their ‘Vroong’ services including TMS, Prime, Fresh, and Logistics.

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS cloud: 
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO

#AWS #ThisIsMyArchitecture
fulltitle: Mesh Korea: How Mesh Korea Built an A/B Test Platform on AWS (Korean)
